__data__.output:
```erlang
-spec solve(list()) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    if
        N < 3 -> false;
        true ->
            P = find_p(nums, 1, N - 1),
            case P of
                N - 1 -> false;
                _ ->
                    Q = find_q(nums, P + 1, N),
                    case Q of
                        N -> false;
                        _ ->
                            check_increasing(nums, Q, N)
                    end
            end
    end.

find_p(nums, Start, End) ->
    find_p_helper(nums, Start, End, 1, 1).

find_p_helper(nums, Start, End, P, Prev) ->
    case P of
        End -> End;
        _ ->
            Current = lists:nth(P, nums),
            case Current > lists:nth(Prev, nums) of
                true -> find_p_helper(nums, Start, End, P + 1, P);
                false -> End
            end
    end.

find_q(nums, Start, End) ->
    find_q_helper(nums, Start, End, 1, 1).

find_q_helper(nums, Start, End, Q, Prev) ->
    case Q of
        End -> End;
        _ ->
            Current = lists:nth(Q, nums),
            case Current < lists:nth(Prev, nums) of
                true -> find_q_helper(nums, Start, End, Q + 1, Q);
                false -> End
            end
    end.

check_increasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    check_increasing_helper(nums, Start, End, 1).

check_increasing_helper(nums, Start, End, I) ->
    case I of
        End -> true;
        _ ->
            Current = lists:nth(I, nums),
            Prev = lists:nth(I - 1, nums),
            case Current > Prev of
                true -> check_increasing_helper(nums, Start, End, I + 1);
                false -> false
            end
    end.
```

Please generate code to solve the following task:

给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

如果存在索引 `0 < p < q < n − 1`，使得数组满足以下条件，则称其为 **三段式数组（trionic）**：

- `nums[0...p]` **严格** 递增，
- `nums[p...q]` **严格** 递减，
- `nums[q...n − 1]` **严格** 递增。

如果 `nums` 是三段式数组，返回 `true`；否则，返回 `false`。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入:** nums = [1,3,5,4,2,6]

**输出:** true

**解释:**

选择 `p = 2`, `q = 4`：

- `nums[0...2] = [1, 3, 5]` 严格递增 (`1 < 3 < 5`)。
- `nums[2...4] = [5, 4, 2]` 严格递减 (`5 > 4 > 2`)。
- `nums[4...5] = [2, 6]` 严格递增 (`2 < 6`)。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [2,1,3]

**输出:** false

**解释:**

无法选出能使数组满足三段式要求的 `p` 和 `q` 。

 

**提示:**

- `3 <= n <= 100`
- `-1000 <= nums[i] <= 1000`

======
You must strictly follow this signature:
bool solve(std::vector<long long> nums)

Target language: C++

Requirements:
1. You may include auxiliary/helper code before or after the required signature.
2. All import/include statements (e.g., `import` in Python, `#include` in C/C++) must be placed at the very top of the file.
3. Preserve the provided signature exactly as given. Do not modify parameter names, types, or return types.
4. Ensure the final code is complete, self-contained, and directly runnable.
5. Return ONLY the raw code. Do not include explanations, markdown backticks, or conversational text.

        You will be provide a description of problem and a reference solution of it in C++ and then you should generate the right solution of that problem.
        The reference solution may be wrong, so just refer it, DO NOT translate it.

__data__.output:
```erlang
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    if
        N < 3 -> false;
        true ->
            P = find_p(nums, 1, N - 1),
            case P of
                N - 1 -> false;
                _ ->
                    Q = find_q(nums, P, N),
                    case Q of
                        N -> false;
                        _ ->
                            check_increasing(nums, Q, N),
                            true
                    end
            end
    end.

find_p(nums, Start, End) ->
    P = lists:foldl(
        fun(I, Acc) ->
            case Acc of
                P when P >= End -> P;
                _ ->
                    case I >= Start of
                        true ->
                            case nums[I] > nums[I - 1] of
                                true -> I;
                                false -> Acc
                            end
                    end
            end
        end,
        Start,
        lists:seq(Start, End)
    ).

find_q(nums, Start, End) ->
    Q = lists:foldl(
        fun(I, Acc) ->
            case Acc of
                Q when Q >= End -> Q;
                _ ->
                    case I >= Start of
                        true ->
                            case nums[I] < nums[I - 1] of
                                true -> I;
                                false -> Acc
                            end
                    end
            end
        end,
        Start,
        lists:seq(Start, End)
    ).

check_increasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(I, Acc) ->
            case I >= Start of
                true ->
                    case nums[I] > nums[I - 1] of
                        true -> Acc;
                        false -> false
                    end
            end
        end,
        true,
        lists:seq(Start, End)
    ).
```

        You will be provide a description of problem and a reference solution of it in C++ and then you should generate the right solution of that problem.

__data__.output:
```erlang
-spec solve(list()) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    case N < 3 of
        true -> false;
        false ->
            P = find_p(nums, 1, 1, N - 1),
            case P == N - 1 of
                true -> false;
                false ->
                    Q = find_q(nums, P + 1, N),
                    case Q == N of
                        true -> false;
                        false ->
                            check_increasing(nums, Q, N)
                    end
            end
    end.

find_p(nums, P, Start, End) ->
    case P < End andalso nums[P] > nums[P - 1] of
        true -> find_p(nums, P + 1, Start, End);
        false -> P
    end.

find_q(nums, Q, End) ->
    case Q < End andalso nums[Q] < nums[Q - 1] of
        true -> find_q(nums, Q + 1, End);
        false -> Q
    end.

check_increasing(nums, Start, End) ->
    case Start < End of
        true ->
            case nums[Start] > nums[Start + 1] of
                true -> false;
                false -> check_increasing(nums, Start + 1, End)
            end;
        false -> true
    end.
```

-spec solve(list()) -> boolean().
solve(nums) ->

find_p(nums, P, Start, End) ->

            case nums[Q] > nums[Q - 1] of

                false -> false

        false -> true
